case_title: MARIELLE PLEASANT et al VS. ALAN JOU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED MAR-30-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOU, ALAN
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$28.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLEASANT, MARIELLE MYERS, AMANDA PARKER, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT JOU, ALAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-10-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-29-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2010 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PLAINTIFFS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,125.62 FILED BY PLEASANT, MARIELLE MYERS, AMANDA PARKER, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT JOU, ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLEASANT, MARIELLE MYERS, AMANDA PARKER, JESSICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOU, ALAN $2,125.62 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,235.12, THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF DAMAGES FOR THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. HAVING VIOLATED CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 PERTAINING TO SECURITY DEPOSITS, DEFENDANT LOST HIS RIGHT TO OFFSET. ANY CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT MAY HAVE FOR LOST RENT OR DAMAGES MUST BE PURSUED IN A SEPARATE ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
